tailorExplanation.paragraph: I treated this as a Financial Services Representative at Primerica draft and made financial and services easy to find. You already had the right raw material: financial and services. I pushed that proof forward in Centi – Personal Finance App. Frame customer-facing communication, trust-building, finance interest, coachability, and service reliability for financial education or representative work. I trimmed Taylor.io – Resume Builder & Parser, SecureScape – Smart Security System, and ShelfVision - Dense Shelf Object Detection because they were weaker signals for this read. The biggest help here: kept the projects that best prove the role fit, reframed your experience around the job's strongest signals, and gave the summary a clearer role-specific angle. Under the hood, I changed the summary, experience, projects, skills, the section order, and which sections show based on those signals.

details.title: What I prioritized
items: Frame customer-facing communication, trust-building, finance interest, coachability, and service reliability for financial education or representative work.
I prioritized customer communication, trust-building, finance interest, coachability, service reliability, and people-facing work.

details.title: Why it changed
items: Target story: Demonstrated ability in customer-facing roles with a focus on financial services, showcasing and relationship-building skills.
Main evidence themes: customer communication, trust-building, and finance interest.

details.title: Not directly evidenced
items: I did not claim representative because I could not verify that exact experience in the resume.

details.title: Before you send
items: Do not write the summary as a full-stack engineer applying to finance.
Do not claim proven representative or advisory experience unless evidenced.
Do not call the candidate a sales professional unless formal sales or outreach....
Some JD terms were not directly evidenced: representative.
A row may still be close to the original even after repair, so it is worth a quick read.

Do not claim proven representative or advisory experience unless evidenced.
Do not call the candidate a sales professional unless formal sales or outreach....
Do not claim unsupported terms directly: representative.

subsections.Relevant Coursework: Massive Storage & Big Data, Enterprise Computing, Object-Oriented Software Design
subsections.Honors & Awards: Dean’s List 2021, President’s Honor Roll 2023 – 2025, Pegasus Gold Scholarship
subsections.Clubs & Extracurriculars: AI @ UCF, Knight Hacks, SHPE @ UCF

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
experience.description:
• Collaborated with senior engineers on system design and architecture, contributing to scalable service patterns and data modeling.
• Built and maintained backend services and REST APIs in Python/Django supporting secure internal workflows for financial and compliance teams.
• Developed React dashboards integrated with Django APIs, improving visibility into backend data workflows and operational metrics.
• Optimized Python data-processing pipelines and PostgreSQL queries, achieving a ~40% reduction in latency.
experience.skills: Python, Django, React, PostgreSQL, AWS EC2

experience.title: Server
experience.description:
• Adapted quickly to high-pressure situations, maintaining professionalism while managing multiple tasks.
• Delivered exceptional service in a fast-paced environment, effectively communicating with guests and team members.
• Fostered strong relationships with customers, encouraging repeat business.

experience.title: Host / Expo
experience.description:
• Attention to detail in every order for consistent quality.
• Clear communication with customers, kitchen, and delivery teams.
• Direct impact on business revenue - managing ~35% of store sales.

projects.title: Centi – Personal Finance App
projects.description:
• Developed FastAPI services and PostgreSQL schemas for Plaid integrations, enabling reliable transaction processing and normalized data storage.
• Built and deployed a full-stack finance application that automates account aggregation, transaction tracking, and spending insights across a unified dashboard.
• Created responsive React dashboards and authentication flows for account management, transaction review, and financial analytics.
• Implemented authentication and secure data handling (OAuth/JWT), ensuring protected access to financial data and user account workflows.

summary.summary: Customer-focused professional with a strong foundation in financial services and technical expertise. Proven ability to communicate effectively and build relationships in high-pressure environments. Experience in developing financial applications and providing exceptional service, ensuring client satisfaction and trust.

summary.before: Full-stack engineer specializing in scalable data pipelines, platforms, and backend services. Skilled in React, Python, and Java, with strong database and API expertise. Passionate about turning complex data into reliable, user-focused applications.
summary.after: Customer-focused professional with a strong foundation in financial services and technical expertise. Proven ability to communicate effectively and build relationships in high-pressure environments. Experience in developing financial applications and providing exceptional service, ensuring client satisfaction and trust.

description.before:
• Built and maintained backend services and REST APIs in Python/Django supporting secure internal workflows for financial and compliance teams.
• Collaborated with senior engineers on system design, requirements, and architecture, contributing to scalable service patterns and data modeling.
• Developed React dashboards integrated with Django APIs, improving visibility into backend data workflows and operational metrics.
• Optimized Python data-processing pipelines and PostgreSQL queries, improving system scalability and reducing latency by ~40%.

• Built and maintained backend services and REST APIs in Python/Django supporting secure internal workflows for financial and compliance teams.
• Developed React dashboards integrated with Django APIs, improving visibility into backend data workflows and operational metrics.
• Optimized Python data-processing pipelines and PostgreSQL queries, achieving a ~40% reduction in latency.

• Designed FastAPI services and PostgreSQL schemas for Plaid integrations, enabling reliable transaction processing and normalized data storage.

description.after:
• Developed FastAPI services and PostgreSQL schemas for Plaid integrations, enabling reliable transaction processing and normalized data storage.
• Built and deployed a full-stack finance application that automates account aggregation, transaction tracking, and spending insights across a unified dashboard.
• Created responsive React dashboards and authentication flows for account management, transaction review, and financial analytics.
• Implemented authentication and secure data handling (OAuth/JWT), ensuring protected access to financial data and user account workflows.

before.title: Taylor.io – Resume Builder & Parser
before.description:
• Built an AI-powered resume platform that automates parsing of PDF/DOCX files into structured, editable profile data.
• Implemented backend services for parsing, authentication, and export workflows using FastAPI and PostgreSQL.
• Created a live editing and preview experience in React, enabling users to customize resume content in real time through  a clean, guided interface.
• Integrated OpenAI API for structured parsing and content generation, enabling automated resume extraction and  editing workflows.

before.title: SecureScape – Smart Security System
before.description:
• Developed the Flutter mobile app with core controls including alarm toggling, lighting, photo capture, and recording  access.
• Built the Python backend and communication layer for device coordination, enabling reliable messaging and near real time alerts (<3.5s).

before.title: ShelfVision - Dense Shelf Object Detection
before.description:
• Detects products in crowded retail shelf photos using ResNet-50 and FPN features.
• Handles overlapping items with smart anchor matching and IoU-based detection algorithms.
• Benchmarked on SKU-110K dataset with comprehensive metrics and YOLOv5 comparisons.

before.title: Tizirsso Racing – Portfolio & Sponsorship Website
before.description:
• Built a custom motorsport portfolio site translating brand identity and racing history into a polished, mobile-first  experience.
• Developed interactive UI sections including an animated hero, editorial about page, career timeline, team history,  championship highlights, and image galleries with lightbox support.

before.title: SentimentTrader -  Real-Time Stock Sentiment Pipeline
before.description:
• Designed and implemented an end-to-end production-style ML data pipeline for real-time sentiment analytics, processing 1K+ Reddit finance posts per run via multi-stage ETL.
• Applied NLP models (FinBERT) and feature engineering to build 40+ predictive features per ticker; trained XGBoost models achieving 55–70% ROC-AUC.
• Built modular components for data ingestion, transformation, model inference, and distributed-style batching, aligned with message-driven architectures.
• Automated end-to-end data collection, preprocessing, and model inference workflows, enabling scalable real-time analytics.
